CREDIT SUPPORT ANNEX
to the Schedule to the 2002 ISDA Master Agreement
(Security Interest – New York Law)

Dated as of October 1, 2023

Party A: Atlas Capital Advisors LLC
Party B: Meridian Securities Ltd (LEI: 5493001RKX5PVOA2GM83)

Paragraph 13. Elections and Variables

(b) Threshold.
    The Threshold for Party A shall be USD 0.
    The Threshold for Party B shall be USD 0.

(c) Minimum Transfer Amount.
    The Minimum Transfer Amount for Party A shall be USD 500,000.
    The Minimum Transfer Amount for Party B shall be USD 500,000.

(d) Independent Amount.
    The Independent Amount for Party A shall be USD 2,000,000.
    The Independent Amount for Party B shall be USD 0.

(e) Eligible Credit Support.
    The following categories of assets shall constitute Eligible Credit Support
    for the purposes of this Annex:

    (i)  US Treasury Securities (all maturities) — Haircut: 0.5%
    (ii) German Federal Government Bonds (Bunds) up to 30 years — Haircut: 1.0%
    (iii) Cash in USD — Haircut: 0%

    Concentration Limits: No single issuer (other than the US or German Federal
    Government) shall exceed 20% of the total credit support balance.

(f) Custodian.
    BNY Mellon shall act as Custodian for both parties pursuant to the
    tri-party custody agreement separately entered into.
    Rehypothecation of pledged collateral is not permitted.

(g) IM Calculation Method.
    The parties agree to use ISDA SIMM v2.6 for the calculation of the
    Initial Margin requirement.

(h) Interest Rate on Cash Collateral.
    USD cash: SOFR flat
    EUR cash: €STR flat

(i) Settlement.
    Delivery of Eligible Credit Support shall be made within T+2 Business Days.
    Notification time: 10:00 AM New York time.

(j) Valuation Agent.
    Party B shall act as Valuation Agent.

(k) Dispute Resolution.
    Any dispute with respect to a Transfer demand must be resolved within
    3 Business Days of the dispute notice.

Governing law: The laws of the State of New York.
